input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule VE.3.3.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: ve.3.3.4
            TITLE: socks

            CONTENT:
            rule VE.3.3.4: Socks
VE.3.3.4 Socks 
Socks made from Flame Resistant Material that cover the bare skin between the driver’s suit 
and the Shoes.

final_answer: rule VE.3.3.4: Socks VE.3.3.4 Socks Socks made from Flame Resistant Material that cover the bare skin between the driver’s suit and the Shoes.
